languages.text: {n}Высокий Фактотум кланяется, вклиниваясь в разговор.{/n} "Я вынужден привлечь внимание к еще одной проблеме. Она не столь масштабная, как все ранее упомянутое, но, тем не менее, весьма существенная. Древнейший археотех, священный имплантационный трон, поврежденный во время бунта, находится под угрозой гибели. Я не смею более отнимать ваше драгоценное время, так что нижайше прошу при возможности спуститься в Сектор Бионика, где Мастер Двигателя поведает о трагедии".

{n}The High Factotum bows, forcing his way into the conversation:{/n} "I am compelled to draw your attention to another problem. It is on a lesser scale than anything previously mentioned, but it is nonetheless significant. Our most ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne damaged during the riot, is at risk of destruction. I dare not take up any more of your valuable time, so please, if possible, attend the Sector Bionica, where the Drivesmaster will tell you of the tragedy."

languages.text: {n}高阶顾问微微躬身，冒昧打断了谈话。{/n}“还有一件事不得不向您汇报。与之前那些问题相比，它的量级要低得多，但同样意义重大。我们最古老的远古科技，即那台在叛乱中受损的神圣移植王座，正面临彻底毁灭的风险。我不敢继续占用您宝贵的时间，所以您要是有空，烦请移步仿生区，驱动大师会向您禀明这场不幸事件的详情。”
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum bows, forcing his way into the conversation:{/n} "I am compelled to draw your attention to another problem. It is on a lesser scale than anything previously mentioned, but it is nonetheless significant. Our most ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne damaged during the riot, is at risk of destruction. I dare not take up any more of your valuable time, so please, if possible, attend the Sector Bionica, where the Drivesmaster will tell you of the tragedy."

traits.locale_text: {n}高阶顾问微微躬身，冒昧打断了谈话。{/n}“还有一件事不得不向您汇报。与之前那些问题相比，它的量级要低得多，但同样意义重大。我们最古老的远古科技，即那台在叛乱中受损的神圣移植王座，正面临彻底毁灭的风险。我不敢继续占用您宝贵的时间，所以您要是有空，烦请移步仿生区，驱动大师会向您禀明这场不幸事件的详情。”

languages.text: {n}El Sumo Factótum irrumpe en la conversación con una reverencia:{/n} «Me veo en la obligación de comunicarle que tenemos otro problema. Quizá no tan calamitoso como otros, pero no por ello menos acuciante. Nuestra pieza de arqueotecnología más antigua, el sagrado trono de implantación que resultó dañado durante el altercado, podría correr peligro. Como no deseo robarle su preciado tiempo, le ruego que tenga a bien acudir al Sector Bionica para que la maestra de motores le ponga al corriente de la tragedia».
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum bows, forcing his way into the conversation:{/n} "I am compelled to draw your attention to another problem. It is on a lesser scale than anything previously mentioned, but it is nonetheless significant. Our most ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne damaged during the riot, is at risk of destruction. I dare not take up any more of your valuable time, so please, if possible, attend the Sector Bionica, where the Drivesmaster will tell you of the tragedy."

languages.text: {n}Le haut factotum vous adresse une révérence, s'invitant dans la conversation :{/n} « Je me vois obligé d'attirer votre attention sur un autre problème, certes moins grave que les précédents, mais néanmoins notable. Notre archéotechnologie la plus ancienne, le fauteuil d'implantation sacré endommagé lors de l'émeute, risque d'être détruite. Mais je vous ai déjà fait perdre bien assez de temps, alors je vous en prie, si vous le pouvez, rendez-vous au secteur Bionica, où la maîtresse des machines vous expliquera cette tragédie plus en détail. »
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum bows, forcing his way into the conversation:{/n} "I am compelled to draw your attention to another problem. It is on a lesser scale than anything previously mentioned, but it is nonetheless significant. Our most ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne damaged during the riot, is at risk of destruction. I dare not take up any more of your valuable time, so please, if possible, attend the Sector Bionica, where the Drivesmaster will tell you of the tragedy."

Notre archéotechnologie la plus ancienne, le fauteuil d'implantation sacré endommagé lors de l'émeute, risque d'être détruite. Mais je vous ai déjà fait perdre bien assez de temps, alors je vous en prie, si vous le pouvez, rendez-vous au secteur Bionica, où la maîtresse des machines vous expliquera cette tragédie plus en détail. »

languages.text: {n}Das Hoch-Faktotum verneigt sich und mischt sich in die Unterhaltung ein.{/n} "Ich fühle mit genötigt, Eure Aufmerksamkeit auf ein anderes Problem zu richten. Es ist von geringerer Tragweite als alles bisher Erwähnte, aber dennoch bedeutsam. Unser ältester Archäotech, der während der Unruhen beschädigte heilige Implantationsthron, läuft Gefahr, zerstört zu werden. Ich will Euch nicht länger Eure wertvolle Zeit stehlen, also bitte findet Euch im Sektor Bionica ein, wo Euch die Triebwerksmeisterin von der Tragödie berichten wird."
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum bows, forcing his way into the conversation:{/n} "I am compelled to draw your attention to another problem. It is on a lesser scale than anything previously mentioned, but it is nonetheless significant. I dare not take up any more of your valuable time, so please, if possible, attend the Sector Bionica, where the Drivesmaster will tell you of the tragedy."

languages.text: {n}Arşıkâhya, reverans yaparak sohbete dâhil oluyor.{/n} "Dikkatinizi başka bir soruna çekmek zorundayım. Daha önce bahsedilen şeylerden daha küçük ölçekli ama yine de önemli. İsyan sırasında hasar gören kadim arkeotek, kutsal implantasyon tahtı yok olma tehlikesiyle karşı karşıya. Değerli vaktinizi daha fazla almak istemem, bu yüzden mümkünse lütfen Motor Üstadı'nın size bu trajediden bahsedeceği Sektör Biyonika'ya buyurun."
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum bows, forcing his way into the conversation:{/n} "I am compelled to draw your attention to another problem. İsyan sırasında hasar gören kadim arkeotek, kutsal implantasyon tahtı yok olma tehlikesiyle karşı karşıya. Değerli vaktinizi daha fazla almak istemem, bu yüzden mümkünse lütfen Motor Üstadı'nın size bu trajediden bahsedeceği Sektör Biyonika'ya buyurun."

languages.text: {n}最高官僚は頭を下げ、会話に割り込みます:{/n}「もう一つ、お話しすべき問題があります。規模はこれまで述べたものより小さいですが、それでも重要な問題です。暴動で損傷した、最も古いアーケオテクノロジーである聖なる植入王座が、破壊の危機に瀕しています。貴重な時間をさらに消費するわけにはいきませんので、もし可能であれば、セクター・ビオニカへお越しください。そこでドライブマスターがその悲劇についてお話しします。」
